message:
fix: add missing PaletteMatchMode, style constants, and StyleContext methods

Fixes broken compilation from uncommitted working tree changes that were
referenced by committed app.rs code. Adds PaletteMatchMode enum and
match_mode field to palette.rs, STYLE_TAB_ACTIVE/INACTIVE/KBD_KEY/DESC
constants to style_system.rs, and agent_accent_style/score_style methods
to StyleContext. Removes duplicate PaletteMatchMode from app.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
